section_miscategorizations.text: Order a repeat A1c test in one month to assess long-term blood pressure control.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The action (ordering an A1c) is correctly in the Plan, but the stated purpose (assess long-term blood pressure control) is conceptually incorrect for this lab and could mislead a reader about its clinical intent. This is a content/clinical accuracy issue rather than a section placement problem, so only a minor organizational concern.
